# TRETRA Wear

> Egyptian streetwear brand — heavyweight oversized hoodies, tees, and sweatpants. Honest pricing, premium quality, made for everyday wear.

TRETRA Wear designs and sells premium streetwear in Egypt. Free shipping on orders over 1,500 EGP. Domestic (Egypt) shipping, 2–5 business days. 14-day returns on unworn items.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, featured drops, and hero collections.
- [Shop](/shop): Full product catalog — hoodies, half-zips, fur-lined, DTF-printed tees, wide-leg sweatpants.
- [About](/about): Brand story, values, and what makes TRETRA different.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about sizing, shipping, returns, and care.
- [Size Guide](/size-guide): Sizing chart and fit guidance for oversized pieces.
- [Shipping](/shipping): Delivery times, costs, and free-shipping threshold.
- [Returns](/returns): Return and exchange policy.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
